title: [cross-impl] Rust TrickleSafeLiveness diverges from Zephyr/C neighbor pruning
description: The commit 6596ea225 added TrickleSafeLiveness in rust/lichen-node/src/routing.rs:173 (10s grace period before TimeoutLiveness) and switched prune_with_removed. No equivalent logic found in lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl* or oscore.c neighbor handling or Python simulator. Same liveness algorithm must produce identical neighbor table behavior across Python/Rust/Zephyr impls to avoid routing divergence. Test vectors or shared policy needed. References RPL Trickle timers in spec.
